title: Edinburgh Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Edinburgh, with a Z-Score of -3.20. Temperatures are significantly lower than average.
body:
The current cold snap in Edinburgh is causing disruptions to daily life, with a Score of 10.0/10 and a critical level warning. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 12.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 67% and wind speed is at 7.9 km/h, making the cold feel even more bitter.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure safety and minimize disruptions.
